message:
feat(trace): add TraceReplayer for deterministic replay with stepping support

- Add TraceReplayer struct that feeds recorded decisions back for exact replay
- Implement ReplayMode enum (Run, Step, RunTo) for different execution modes
- Implement Breakpoint enum (Tick, Task, EventIndex) for stopping at specific points
- Add DivergenceError with detailed context for debugging execution mismatches
- Implement event verification with helpful divergence messages
- Support seek/reset for navigating through traces
- Add EventSource trait for extensibility with different event providers
- Include comprehensive unit tests (10 tests, all passing)

Part of replay infrastructure: recorded traces can now be replayed
event-by-event with step debugging and breakpoint support.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
